# iaas_account (Data Source)

Returns the authenticated caller's own account (whoami). This is a SINGLETON data source — it has no input filter, since there is exactly one account behind the configured provider token. Referencing it (e.g. as `data.iaas_account.current`) validates the token and IP-lock during plan/apply, letting a misconfigured provider fail fast, and exposes `id` for use elsewhere in a configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Whoami: the account behind the provider's configured token. This is a
# SINGLETON data source with no input filter — referencing it validates the
# token + IP-lock during plan/apply, so a misconfigured provider fails fast.

data "iaas_account" "current" {}

output "account_id" {
  value = data.iaas_account.current.id
}

output "is_admin" {
  value = data.iaas_account.current.is_admin
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `company_name` (String) Company name on the account, if set.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp the account was created.
- `default_currency` (String) Account's default billing currency code (e.g. `USD`).
- `email` (String) Account email address.
- `first_name` (String) Account holder's first name.
- `gravatar` (String) Gravatar URL derived from the account email.
- `id` (String) UUID of the authenticated account.
- `is_admin` (Boolean) Whether the authenticated account is a master-panel admin.
- `last_login_at` (String) Timestamp of the account's last login.
- `last_name` (String) Account holder's last name.
- `owner_id` (String) UUID of the account-owning user. Empty when the authenticated account IS the owner; non-empty means the token belongs to a subuser of that owner account.
- `self_provisioning` (Boolean) Whether self-provisioning resource packs are enabled for the account.
- `status` (Number) Account status code.
- `timezone` (String) Account's configured timezone (e.g. `America/New_York`).
- `two_factor_enabled` (Boolean) Whether two-factor authentication (TOTP) is enabled on the account.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp the account was last updated.
